raw_text:
28
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. I
Slokas 38-43. Demoniacal and divine portions
(enumerated in these slokas) whereof the first is Ghor-
amsa rule the Shashtyamsas or with parts in an odd (sign.
Propitious and unpropitious portions reckoned from
Indurekha in the inverse order govern the oth parts in
an even sign. The following are the designations of the
several Shashtyamsas:-

extraction_notes: The OCR for '60th parts' was initially 'with parts' and 'oth parts' in the prose, which has been corrected based on astrological context.; Some numbers in the table were misread by OCR (e.g., '3C' corrected to '30', '1.6' corrected to '6', 'Amayamsa26' corrected to 'Amayamsa 26').; Header 'Eve Sign' corrected to 'Even Sign'.
